title: Operating Room Services Mission and Vision
content:
Operating Room Services Mission and Vision

Mission

Needed in the health sector; To raise students with ethical and moral values by adhering to the rules required by their qualified, competent, modern and professional knowledge.

Vision

To train the respected Operating Room Technician who has reached the level of knowledge at the international level and is preferred in the public and private sectors.
